name: Garbanzo Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) Garbanzo or Chickpeas, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Saute onion until golden. Add water, garbanzos or chickpeas, bouillon cubes, salt, garlic salt, mint leaves and pepper. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir in macaroni. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer 20 minutes.
4. Serve topped with Parmesan cheese and garnished with minced parsley.
